overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia running along a dirt path through rural countryside during a dramatic sunset. The character travels from a grassy meadow past a large oak tree through open fields and into denser woodland, with the golden hour lighting creating long shadows and warm orange tones throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural meadow path with large oak tree

events.description: large oak tree temporarily blocks the right side of view as character passes close by

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs steadily along the dirt path toward the large oak tree ahead, with swords bouncing on his back

entered.detail: massive spreading oak tree with thick trunk and wide canopy dominating the right side
rustic wooden fence posts and rails along the right side of path
worn dirt path cutting through the grassy meadow
tall green grass fields extending to the horizon on both sides
dense line of trees visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a dirt trail through an open meadow during sunset, approaching a massive oak tree on the right. A rustic wooden fence lines the path as the character moves steadily forward, with the warm backlit sky creating long shadows across the grass.

events.description: exiting the shadow of the oak tree, facing directly into the bright setting sun creating lens flare
flock of birds flies across the sky silhouetted against the orange sunset

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues running as the path opens up, with the setting sun creating a warm golden glow and lens flare effects

entered.detail: tall willow tree with drooping branches ahead on the path
flock of birds flying in formation against the sunset sky
bright sun low on the horizon creating intense orange and gold lighting

segments.scene_description: After passing the oak tree, the scene opens into a wide meadow facing the setting sun directly. Geralt runs toward a willow tree as birds fly across the golden sky, with the lighting shifting from backlit to direct sun exposure creating dramatic lens flare.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded woodland trail approaching rural structure

events.description: entering denser tree cover as the path becomes more shaded and enclosed
wooden fence reappears on left and a rural structure becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs through the increasingly shaded path as the vegetation becomes denser, approaching a structure ahead

entered.detail: thick bushes and trees lining both sides of the path creating shade
wooden fence posts along the left side of the path
small building or hut visible at the end of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more enclosed area with dense foliage creating shade. A wooden fence appears on the left as Geralt approaches a rural structure in the distance, with the bright sunset now occluded by the surrounding trees.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural countryside that transitions from an open, backlit meadow into a shaded woodland area. It begins with Geralt running along a dirt trail beside a rustic wooden fence, moving steadily toward a massive oak tree under a warm sunset sky. As the camera passes the oak, the landscape opens into a wide meadow facing the setting sun directly, where birds fly across the golden sky and dramatic lens flares emerge. The scene then shifts as the path enters a more enclosed area of dense foliage, causing the bright sunlight to be occluded by the canopy. Finally, the camera follows the character past a wooden fence on the left toward a distant rural structure nestled within the deepening shade.
